---
title: "Kings of England: A History for Young Children."
---

## Kings of England: A History for Young Children.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1848
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, Paternoster Row, London, and Joseph Masters, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
